patch_history.raw: Cyber Cage Fixed an issue where throw animations would break if aiming straight down Trapwire Fixed a bug where a placed Trapwire could be heard being placed again as the barrier drops. v

Cyber Cage Fixed a bug where enemy player positions could be briefly revealed on the minimap while they are hidden by it Spycam Fixed a bug where it would appear to be recovered even if the camera was destroyed while being recovered Trapwire Fixed a bug where it would appear to be visually active if Cypher was killed just before it finished arming v
Neural Theft Fixed a bug where it would sometimes display a blank icon on the minimap v

Spycam Added stealthing functionality Inactive camera will be revealed to enemies when you are within 8 meter radius of the camera, and will also have an accompanying audio tell When the camera is active, there will be a louder persistent camera audio for enemies with a 12m range Cooldown when destroyed is increased from 45s >>> 60s Trapwire Trapwire activation has been adjusted to remove the Concuss and Tether debuffs. Timing of other debuffs has been changed. Previously, players were Tethered and Revealed after 0.5 seconds. Trapwire would then activate after 1.5 seconds and Concuss players if it was not destroyed. Now, players will be immediately Slowed upon crossing the Trapwire. Trapwire will now activate after 0.9 seconds and Reveal players if not destroyed OR if the player moves 4 me

patch_history.raw: Spycam Parts of visual glitch effects have been removed. v
Trapwire Fixed an issue where it was more difficult to place than intended. v
Spycam Fixed an issue that caused Cypher’s Spycam dart to not display the correct VFX when seen in first-person perspective. v
Fixed inconsistent spacing in ability tooltips Spycam Dart visuals have been updated so that is easier to understand the dart’s directionality v
Trapwire Fixed an issue where opponents who teleported out of the Trapwire after being hit could run through the same reactivated wire without getting tethered. v
Cyber Cage Fixed an issue where shooting through Cyber Cage could cheat wall penetration if they were placed too close to level geometry v

Trapwire Now has a .5 second windup before the full wallhack reveal applies and fades in. Trapwire now has updated minimap icon treatment to better display what the trap wire is connected to. Neural Theft Ult Cost 6 >>> 7 v

patch_history.raw: Trapwire Fixed an issue where Trapwire did not take damage from certain abilities. v
Spycam Fixed an issue where Spycam could not be placed on some map walls during the Buy Phase. v
Spycam Fixed an issue when exiting Cypher's Spycam that causes a brief stutter for Spectators. v
Spycam Fixed an issue when exiting Cypher's Spycam that caused Cypher's hands to stutter for Spectators. v

Spycam Fixed an issue where shots fired immediately after exiting Spycam would bypass the weapon’s raise animation and not deal damage. The weapon raise animation is now played for its full duration. v

Trapwire Re-arm time increased 1 >>> 2s Slow reduced 2 >>> 1.25s Fixed a bug where Trapwire showed on the map even when disabled. Spycam Enemies now hear looping audio when they are actively being watched by Cypher from within the Spycam v

all_changes.context_label: Trapwire Re-arm time increased
Slow reduced

patch_history.raw: Spycam Fixed an issue causing kills with Trapwire to not be awarded while using Spycam v

Trapwire Decreased the time until the trap concusses a captured enemy 3 >>> 1.5 seconds. After concussing an enemy or an enemy in the trap was killed, the Trapwire no longer destroys itself but instead re-arms after 0.5 seconds, allowing it to ensnare another enemy. Duration of tag slow when hit by the trap increased 0.75 >>> 2 seconds. v

patch_history.raw: Spycam Fixed an issue where you could remain blinded if spectating a flash through Cypher’s Spycam as the round ended. Neural Theft Neural Theft now completes even if Cypher dies after casting. v
Trapwire Fixed a bug where Cypher’s Trapwire would sometimes fail to activate when placed on stairs. v
Cyber Cage Fixed issues where on some map geo Cypher could not pick up Cyber Cage. v

Neural Theft Fixed bug where Neural Theft would only reveal one time if he had been killed or the round had changed during a previous cast Fixed a bug where Neural Theft reveals would be interrupted when he was killed after it had been deployed v
